forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the west coast. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 23.
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
